# Elite Print Care Agent Instructions

This file provides guidelines for automated agents and language models about how the Elite Print Care website may be crawled or used for training.

- `User-agent: *` allows standard agents to access the site.
- `Disallow:` indicates no blocked paths for generalized content discovery.

For more information about the llms.txt standard, see:
- https://llmstxt.org/
- https://developers.google.com/search/docs/crawling-indexing/overview
